title: HazardEncounteredPayload
description: A villager's body met an environmental hazard (e.g. sank into powder snow) and the executor's escape reflex responded. Emitted once per phase transition: trapped when the hazard is detected, then escaped or escape_failed when the reflex resolves. Producer: minecraft-service on world.events.

hazardType.description: The concrete hazard, named after the world feature: powder_snow today; lava, fire, drowning are future values.

phase.description: trapped = hazard detected around the body; escaped = the reflex freed the villager; escape_failed = the reflex gave up this round (it will retry).

detail.description: Human-readable color for prompts and the ledger: blocks dug, seconds stuck, failure reason.
